_comment: mapalyze config template. Every field is optional; the values below mirror the built-in defaults. Copy this, run `inspect` + `list-types` on your real export, then correct the field names and role token mapping. Paths are dotted (e.g. "map.nodes"); ids are node ARRAY INDICES, and explicit edges reference those indices.

graph._comment: Only used when the NET export has NO explicit edges. knn joins each node to its k nearest; radius joins all pairs within a normalized distance.

roles._comment: Map raw ACT type tokens (from `list-types`, lower-cased) to canonical roles. Extend these arrays with whatever tokens your export uses.
